creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
So the xev thing is similar, thanks.

Mute button/volume not working was red herring - it works as before (only with snd_hda - same as before). 

My problem is clearly connected with loading i915kms, so I blame graphics/drm-515-kmod, unfortunately updating to graphics/drm-61-kmod didn't change a thing. Later I will try earlier ones.

Just to be clear, system is FreeBSD 14.1-PRERELEASE #0 stable/14-2b343cd2d amd64, Intel GM45.
